headline: CMS Sanctions And Legal Probes Test Elevance Health Valuation Story
summary: CMS has announced plans to impose sanctions on Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) that would suspend new enrollments in its Medicare Advantage plans. The potential suspension is tied to alleged noncompliance with federal risk adjustment data submission requirements for Medicare Advantage. At the same time, legal investigations have begun into possible securities fraud or unlawful business practices related to these regulatory issues. Elevance Health is a major player in US health insurance, with...

headline: Why Elevance Health (ELV) Is Down 11.3% After Medicare Advantage Sanctions Threat And Community Push
summary: In late February and early March 2026, the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services notified Elevance Health of planned intermediate sanctions that could suspend new enrollment and certain marketing activities for its Medicare Advantage-Prescription Drug plans from March 31, citing past noncompliance with risk adjustment data submission requirements. At the same time, Elevance Health and the National Diaper Bank Network launched a year-long diaper access pilot for up to 9,000 families,...
